errorPhoneInvalid: Only numbers and the characters + - ( ), between 7 and 15 characters
errorCo3: Numbers only, between 6 and 10 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorPe3: Numbers only, exactly 8 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorBl3: Between 4 and 8 digits, with an optional trailing letter (e.g. 1234567A)
errorCr3: Numbers only, exactly 9 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorEc3: Invalid ID — must be 10 valid digits (no letters or symbols)
errorGt3: Numbers only, exactly 13 digits (no letters or symbols)
errorPn3: Only numbers and hyphens, format X-XXX-XXXX
